title: Modern Edge Gallery — Ceramics by Kristy Blackwell
announcement: Coil-built vessels, wheel-thrown tableware, and limited-edition prints and jewelry by artists represented at Modern Edge Gallery in Albuquerque. Currently featuring work tied to the Vessel as Landscape series.
vacation_message: Open for orders — ships from the Nob Hill studio in Albuquerque, NM within 3 business days.
policy_welcome: Welcome to Modern Edge Ceramics — the online shop of Modern Edge Gallery.
digital_sale_message: Thank you! Your care-and-handling guide is attached below — reach out with any questions.
